channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Told not to walk here, 20th May
item.description:
People wearing official looking ID lanyards by the visitor centre over the weekend told a group of us that we had to stick to the official footpath, and directed us back through the carpark and onto a narrow track which looking at the map now wasn't an official footpath and in fact leads straight to where we were walking anyway. they were quite intimidating and we cut our walk short and returned to the car via another route to avoid the people
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A417, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large surface area damage with loose material, 20th May
item.description:
The lead-in section of road to number 24
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Collum End Rise, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, again, 20th May
item.description:
More flytipping in this location and in many other areas around here. I ask the council launch an investigation in to this ongoing issue. Simply cleaning it up and doing nothing else encourages further incidents. Precedent is being set that flytipping is an effective method of waste disposal.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 20th May
item.description:
More flytipping in the area. This is becoming a common occurrence.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Withybridge Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped kids ride on toy, 20th May
item.description:
A pink little tikes ride on toy with no roof has been left on the pavement on Marsh Drive for the last couple of weeks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Marsh Gardens, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 20th May
item.description:
FW abrupt level difference 2000mm x 1000mm x 22mm Give and take TM Outside number 4 (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 20th May
item.description:
NWD GIVE AND TAKE PLEASE BRING X2 UNEVEN FOOTWAY BOARDS OUT PLUS X2 SANDBAGS PLACE 1 BY TREE OUTSIDE NUMBER 1 ANS OTHER OUTSIDE NUMBER 6 (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 20th May
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 20th May

ENWD CWPH 900 x 300 x 81mm Marked as X Standard TM (CW6 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 20th May
item.description:
CW Pothole 600mm x 400mm x 44mm Temporary Closure 15min db ///salon.decreased.midfield (CW10 Pothole)

item.title: Replacement Tree, 20th May
item.description:
A tree that was replaced after I asked for it in 2024, outside my House (61 Sandyleaze GL2 0PX) died and was yesterday removed, will the tree be replaced?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandyleaze, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 20th May
item.description:
FW abrupt level difference 400mm x 300mm x 21mm 1 x NSD Give and take TM At Railings (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 20th May
item.description:
Cut back overgrown hedge 5mtrs completed by inspector at time of visit Give and take TM Near Railway Bridge (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 20th May
item.description:
Pothole FW 700x150x20mm Standard TM with temp FW Closure Stats (FW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Growth of long grass is blocking view when turning right out of Yew Tree Way Churchdown, 20th May
item.description:
The grass/bushes etc are obstructing a driver's view when turning right out of Yew Tree Way. The overgrown area goes all the way up to the Golden Valley bridge.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 95, Pirton Lane, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 20th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days plus temporary footway closure please cut back overgrown tree branches x3 trees approx 20 meters x4 meters high (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 20th May
item.description:
CW Pothole 9 1000mm x 1000mm x 58mm Temporary Closure 15min db Outside number 2 (CW10 Pothole)

item.title: Signs left from diversion, 20th May
item.description:
Signs are located at the isbourne arts centre, former baptist Church in Winchcombe

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Terrace, Winchcombe, Winchcombe

item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Drain blocked, 20th May
item.description:
Drain blocked causing flooding in garages

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sherborne Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
